name: Snackmasters Australia
overview: A cooking contest hosted by Scott Pickett and Poh Ling Yeow, where highly awarded chefs at the top of their game, go head-to-head to perfectly replicate famous Aussie snacks. Plus, Yvie Jones journeys deep into our food factories to find the secrets that go into the creation of Australia’s favourite snacks.
